transcript: 🎵🎵🎵 🎵🎵🎵 Terima kasih telah menonton! what's up richard what are you up to? Leg day bro, same Alright, just got back from the gym, took a shower and it's time for breakfast Transcription by ESO. Translation by — Thank you. all right guys so it's exactly 1 p.m right now i actually have class at 1 however i decided to skip it because i have to finish a final project due today at 2 30 so gotta have one hour and a half to finish that up I also really need to do my laundry because I'm running out of clothes so I'm gonna go take some time to do that right now so the project I'm working on right now is for my course 18, which is the math department class, and it's for my statistics minor. The class is called Mathematics with Applications in Finance, and the project I'm working on is a dynamic portfolio optimization trading strategy, which I'm currently coding up in Julia. And I also have to write the report, which I have to present in less than an hour and a half. Thank you. Thank you for watching. I just finished my final presentation and it went pretty well actually. Heading to an event to meet up with the frat. Thank you. © BF-WATCH TV 2021 Thank you. Thank you. We'll be right back. To be continued... Thank you for watching.
